suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update worker-fullstack guidance to explicitly cover post-release validation-only tasks (e.g., evidence expectations and verification scope) so these tasks are treated as first-class work rather than implementation outliers.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-post-release review for post-release-npm-wrapper-validation recorded a skill-procedure gap for validation-only/post-release verification flow.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Define and enforce a canonical GitHub repository slug for release artifacts and references across wrappers/docs/actions to prevent URL drift regressions.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: misc-post-release review found mixed slug usage across files (bierlingm/spikes and moritzbierling/spikes), the same class of drift that caused the npm wrapper download failure.
